glyphs.name: Headhunter
glyphs.description: Grants +30.0% bonus to all Normal nodes within range. Damage bonus increased by 0.0%[x].
glyphs.bonusEffect: You deal 10%[x] increased damage to Elites.

glyphs.name: Ambush
glyphs.description: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +1.9% increased damage to targets affected by Trap Skills.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Enemies affected by Trap Skills take 10%[x] increased damage from you.

glyphs.name: Bane (Rogue)
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, you deal +1.9% increased Poison damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Non-Physical damage increases all the Non-Physical damage an enemy takes from you by 1%[x], up to 10%[x], for 15 seconds.

glyphs.name: Canny
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, you deal +1.9% increased Non-Physical damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Non-Physical damage increases the damage an enemy takes from you by 1%[x], up to 10%[x], for 15 seconds.

glyphs.name: Chip
glyphs.description: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +3.3% increased Physical damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Physical damage increases the damage an enemy takes from you by 1%[x], up to 10%[x], for 15 seconds.

glyphs.name: Closer
glyphs.description: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, your Cutthroat Skills deal +1.3% increased damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: While wielding a Melee weapon, you take 10% reduced damage.

glyphs.name: Combat (Glyph)
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, all Damage deals +1.9% increased Critical Strike Damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Skills that Critically Strike restore 12% of their Energy cost.

glyphs.name: Control (Rogue)
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, you deal +2.9% increased damage to Crowd Controlled targets.
glyphs.bonusEffect: You deal 10%[x] increased damage to Slowed or Chilled enemies or, instead, 20%[x] increased damage to Stunned or Frozen enemies.

glyphs.name: Devious
glyphs.description: Grants +30.0% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.
glyphs.bonusEffect: When you hit an enemy with an attack that applies a Crowd Control effect, they take 2%[x], up to 10%[x], increased damage from you for 20 seconds.

glyphs.name: Diminish
glyphs.description: Grants +25.0% bonus to all Rare nodes within range.
glyphs.bonusEffect: You take 10% reduced Physical damage from Vulnerable enemies.

glyphs.name: Efficacy
glyphs.description: Grants +25.0% bonus to all Rare nodes within range.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Imbuement Skill effects have 20%[x] increased potency.

glyphs.name: Exploit (Rogue)
glyphs.description: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +0.9% increased damage to Vulnerable targets.
glyphs.bonusEffect: When an enemy is damaged by you, they become Vulnerable for 3 seconds. This cannot happen more than once every 20 seconds per enemy.

glyphs.name: Explosive
glyphs.description: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, your Stun Grenades deal +13.2% increased damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Dropping a Stun Grenade grants you 10% Damage Reduction for 2 seconds.

glyphs.name: Fluidity
glyphs.description: Grants +30.0% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.
glyphs.bonusEffect: When you cast an Agility Skill, you gain 9%[x] increased Energy Regeneration for 6 seconds.

glyphs.name: Frostfeeder
glyphs.description: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, you deal +1.9% increased damage to Chilled targets.
glyphs.bonusEffect: You gain 20%[x] increased Chill effect.

glyphs.name: Infusion
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, Skills that are Imbued deal +2.9% increased damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Casting an Imbuement Skill reduces the active Cooldown of another random Imbuement Skill by 0.5 seconds.

glyphs.name: Nightstalker
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, you deal +2.0% increased Shadow damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Entering Stealth reduces the active time window of Shadow Imbuement by 4 seconds.

glyphs.name: Pride
glyphs.description: Paragon nodes within range gain +15.0% bonus to their Physical damage and damage reduction modifiers.
glyphs.bonusEffect: You deal 13%[x] increased Physical damage to both Healthy and Injured enemies.

glyphs.name: Ranger
glyphs.description: For every 5 Dexterity purchased within range, Marksman Skills deal +1.3% increased damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: While wielding a Ranged weapon, you take 10% reduced damage.

glyphs.name: Snare
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, Trap Skills deal +2.6% increased damage.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Non-Ultimate Trap Skills have 25%[x] increased radius.

glyphs.name: Tracker (Rogue)
glyphs.description: For every 5 Intelligence purchased within range, you deal +1.5% increased damage to Poisoned targets.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Poisoning damage effects last 33%[x] longer.

glyphs.name: Turf
glyphs.description: For every 5 Strength purchased within range, you deal +1.9% increased damage to Close targets.
glyphs.bonusEffect: You gain 10% Damage Reduction against Close enemies.

glyphs.name: Versatility
glyphs.description: Grants +30.0% bonus to all Magic nodes within range.
glyphs.bonusEffect: Non-Basic and Non-Core Skills deal 15%[x] increased damage.

starting_legendary.name: Savagery
starting_legendary.description: Lucky Hit: Up to a 5% chance to make your next attack deal 100%[x] increased damage for 4 seconds.

eldritch_bounty_legendary.name: Eldritch Bounty
eldritch_bounty_legendary.description: When you attack with an Imbued Skill you gain 3%[x] Maximum Resistance and 20%[x] increased damage for that Imbuement's element for 9 seconds.

tricks_legendary.name: Tricks of the Trade
tricks_legendary.description: Your Marksman Skills grant your Cutthroat Skills 25%[x] increased damage for 8 seconds. Your Cutthroat Skills grant your Marksman Skills 25%[x] increased damage for 8 seconds.

cheap_shot_legendary.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot_legendary.description: You deal 5%[x] increased damage for each Nearby enemy that is Crowd Controlled, up to 25%[x]. A Nearby Staggered Boss provides the maximum bonus.

deadly_ambush_legendary.name: Deadly Ambush
deadly_ambush_legendary.description: When you damage an enemy with a Trap Skill, that enemy takes 40%[x] increased damage from your next direct damage attack.

leyrana_instinct_legendary.name: Leyrana's Instinct
leyrana_instinct_legendary.description: When Inner Sight's gauge becomes full, you gain 100%[x] Dodge Chance for 2 seconds. Your Core Skills deal increased damage equal to 25%[x] of your Core Skill Damage Bonus while Inner Sight's gauge remains full, up to 35.0%[x].

no_witnesses_legendary.name: No Witnesses
no_witnesses_legendary.description: Your Ultimate Skills gain an additional 10%[x] damage from your Damage with Ultimate bonus and grant this bonus to all Skills for 10 seconds when cast. Maximum Bonus: 45%[x].

exploit_legendary.name: Exploit Weakness
exploit_legendary.description: Lucky Hit: Hitting a Vulnerable enemy has up to a 60% chance to increase your damage by 1%[x] for 25 seconds, up to 25%[x]. At 25 stacks, this bonus remains for 8 seconds before expiring.

cunning_stratagem_legendary.name: Cunning Stratagem
cunning_stratagem_legendary.description: Your non-damage Combo Point bonuses are increased by 33% when you spend 3 Combo Points.

danse_macabre_legendary.name: Danse Macabre
danse_macabre_legendary.description: Casting a Mobility or Subterfuge Skill increases the damage of your next Skill by 50%[x].

Generic_Rare_001.name: Resilient
Generic_Rare_001.description: +11.5% Resistance to All Elements, +6.0% Maximum Life. Bonus: +11.5% more Resistance to All Elements.

Generic_Rare_002.name: Swift Attacker
Generic_Rare_002.description: +3.5% Attack Speed, +30% Skill Damage. Bonus: +3.5% more Attack Speed.

Generic_Rare_006.description: 12% Crowd Control Duration Reduction, 7.5% Damage Over Time Reduction. Bonus: +12% more CC Duration Reduction.

Generic_Rare_030.name: Executioner
Generic_Rare_030.description: 2% chance to Execute low-health non-Elite enemies on hit, +3.0% Attack Speed. Bonus: +2% more Execute chance.

Generic_Rare_033.name: Potion Expert
Generic_Rare_033.description: +20.0% Potion Healing, Regenerate Life when not taking damage. Bonus: +20% more Potion Healing.

Generic_Rare_041.name: Poison Hardy

Generic_Rare_042.name: Restorative

Generic_Rare_046.name: Shadow Hardy
Generic_Rare_046.description: +11.5% Shadow Resistance, +6.0% Maximum Life. Bonus: +11.5% more Shadow Resistance.

Generic_Rare_049.name: Predator
Generic_Rare_049.description: +5.0% Damage to Vulnerable enemies, +7.5% Damage to Injured enemies. Bonus: +5% more Vulnerable Damage.

Generic_Rare_051.name: Skillful
Generic_Rare_051.description: +20.0% Skill Damage, +10 Dexterity. Bonus: +20% more Skill Damage.

Generic_Rare_067.name: Armored
Generic_Rare_067.description: +4.0% Armor, +4.5% Potion Healing. Bonus: +4% more Armor.

Generic_Rare_075.name: Vigorous
Generic_Rare_075.description: +20.0% Skill Damage, +4.0% Maximum Life. Bonus: +20% more Skill Damage.

Generic_Rare_082.name: Vital
Generic_Rare_082.description: +4.0% Maximum Life, +10 Dexterity. Bonus: +4% more Maximum Life.

Generic_Rare_096.name: Exploit
Generic_Rare_096.description: +30.0% Damage to Vulnerable enemies, +10 Dexterity. Bonus: +30% more Vulnerable Damage.
